markdownRemark.html:
A collection of interesting things I’ve discovered this month:

  • QA Wolf - “Free and open source library to create Playwright/Jest browser tests and run them in CI”
  • Using Feature Policy - “Feature Policy allows you to control which origins can use which features, both in the top-level page and in embedded frames.”
